claimed_run_name: Record: 11L XSA + EMA + Int6 MLP3x + WD=0.04
submission_blurb: 11 layers with Exclusive Self Attention (XSA) on last 4 layers, EMA weight averaging (decay=0.997), int6 per-row on all MLP+attention weights, int8 tok_emb, zstd-22. Weight decay 0.04 (Muon+AdamW). OrthoInit + muP scaling. SmearGate + BigramHash(2048x128). FA3. Sliding window eval stride=64, seq=2048.
